titleEn: Silicon Valley Bigwigs Scramble to Invest in AI Collars for Cows: Valuation Hits $2 Billion
descriptionZh: 这家新西兰公司给奶牛戴上AI项圈，一年估值飙升20亿美元！
descriptionEn: This New Zealand company puts AI collars on cows, and its valuation soared by $2 billion in a year! Founders Fund led the investment, with investors scrambling for oversubscription. Its secret weapon is called the "Cowgorithm"—an algorithm that lets cows release themselves.

title: OpenClaw引发网络屠杀，官方回应：立即烧毁
description: 为了让人工智能帮助数饺子，Thiel Fellow 获得者 Brandon Wang 将他的全部数字信息开放给开源软件 OpenClaw。
titleZh: OpenClaw引发网络屠杀，官方回应：立即烧毁
titleEn: OpenClaw Triggers Cyber Massacre, Official Response: Burn It Immediately
descriptionZh: 为了让人工智能帮助数饺子，Thiel Fellow 获得者 Brandon Wang 将他的全部数字信息开放给开源软件 OpenClaw。
descriptionEn: To get AI to help count dumplings, Thiel Fellow recipient Brandon Wang opened his entire digital information to the open-source software OpenClaw. This experiment, dubbed "productivity porn," is redefining what "cyber suicide" means.

title: AI教父已停止使用ChatGPT；
description: 在这段 60 分钟的谈话中，他花了很大一部分时间解释他最关心的问题：失去控制、失业和财富不平等扩大。
titleZh: AI教父已停止使用ChatGPT；
titleEn: The Godfather of AI Has Stopped Using ChatGPT; What Is He Worried About?
descriptionZh: 在这段 60 分钟的谈话中，他花了很大一部分时间解释他最关心的问题：失去控制、失业和财富不平等扩大。
descriptionEn: In this 60-minute conversation, he spent a significant portion explaining his greatest concerns: loss of control, unemployment, and widening wealth inequality.

title: 90分钟破解Linux 20年漏洞，Claude 5.0出现内测连Anthropic都惊慌
description: 已经按捺不住了！
titleZh: 90分钟破解Linux 20年漏洞，Claude 5.0出现内测连Anthropic都惊慌
titleEn: 90 Minutes to Crack a 20-Year-Old Linux Vulnerability, Claude 5.0 Appears in Internal Testing, Even Anthropic is Alarmed
descriptionZh: 已经按捺不住了！
descriptionEn: Can't hold back anymore! The strongest Claude Mythos 5.0 suddenly launches internal testing, with programming and reasoning capabilities so powerful it sends chills down your spine. An engineer who joined three weeks ago shares: We don't write a single line of code.

title: 从民工家庭到00后神童，辍学打造110亿美元独角兽，终身教授辞职追随
description: 2亿美元A轮融资，估值110亿美元，仅一年时间就成为独角兽。
titleZh: 从民工家庭到00后神童，辍学打造110亿美元独角兽，终身教授辞职追随
titleEn: From a Migrant Worker Family to a 00s Prodigy, Drops Out to Build an $11 Billion Unicorn, Tenured Professor Quits to Follow
descriptionZh: 2亿美元A轮融资，估值110亿美元，仅一年时间就成为独角兽。
descriptionEn: A $200 million Series A funding round, an $11 billion valuation, becoming a unicorn in just one year. Even more shocking is the founder—25-year-old Hong Letong from Guangzhou, born in the 2000s, whose parents are ordinary migrant workers who never attended university. She uses mathematics to solve AI's biggest pain point: making model reasoning verifiable step-by-step, completely eliminating hallucinations. To join her, a tenured professor from the University of Virginia directly resigned.

descriptionEn: All 11 co-founders cleared out within three years, leaving only Musk himself. Behind xAI's "supergroup breakup" lies the most brutal talent war and empire cracks of the AI era.
